title: rhododendron metternichii var. angustifolium
intro: Rhododendron metternichii var. angustifolium, also known as the Narrow-leaved Metternich Rhododendron, is a deciduous shrub or small tree species native to East Asia. The leaves and flowers of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Rhododendron metternichii var. angustifolium include reducing fever, relieving coughs, and improving overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are often made into teas, infusions, or decoctions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
